parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $('Build Payload').first().json; const dbRes = $input.first().json; const requestId = dbRes.requestId || 0; const rows = payload.items.map((item, i) => ` ${item.item_article_no} ${item.item_name} ${item.last_received_date} ${item.last_received_qty || '—'} ${item.current_stock} ${item.stock_days} ${item.store_requirement} — ` ).join(''); const html = `

Dear HO Team,

The following Non-Trading Request has been automatically received from ${payload.storeName} (${payload.storeCode}) and logged in the VMM CRM.

${rows}
Article No. Item Name Last Received Last Qty Current Stock Days Store Req. HO Recommendation

Request Date: ${payload.requestDate}  |  Received: ${payload.receivedDate}  |  Total Items: ${payload.totalItems}  |  CRM Ref: NTR-${requestId}

Open Mind Services Limited — VMM CRM | Auto-processed from email: ${payload.emailFrom}

`; return [{ json: { html, payload, requestId } }];
